category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Cameroon) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Cameroon Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入喀麦隆：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入喀麥隆：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Cameroon requirements: ANOR-conformity and NC standard adoption, mandatory PECAE-like import conformity and inspection where regulated, ART radio approvals, UN 38.3 transport evidence, in-country importer obligation, 220 V 50 Hz context, and China baseline GB/GB-T/CCC practices.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源文件与喀麦隆要求对照：ANOR合规与NC标准采纳、受监管产品的PECAE式入境合格与检验、ART无线电审批、UN 38.3运输证明、境内进口商义务、220 V 50 Hz电网环境，以及中国GB/GB-T/CCC基准。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源文件與喀麥隆要求對照：ANOR合規與NC標準採納、受監管產品之PECAE式入境合格與檢驗、ART無線電批準、UN 38.3運輸證明、境內進口商義務、220 V 50 Hz電網環境，以及中國GB/GB-T/CCC基準。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment decision, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定决定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定決定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Cameroon requires ANOR/NC alignment for regulated imports where in scope, import inspection through PECAE-like procedures, ART handling of radio-enabled models, UN 38.3 transport evidence, and a cameroonian in-country importer. Importantly, Cameroon does not impose EU-style battery regulation duties such as EU battery passports, RoHS horizontal restrictions, carbon-footprint labels, or outdoor-noise regime obligations. For electrical safety, the operative technical anchor is NC/IEC 62133-like conformity, not the EU framework. CN baseline evidence (GB/GB-T and CCC where applicable) helps at model level but does not satisfy Cameroon paperwork and import-conformity steps alone.
answer_first.zh: 喀麦隆对受监管进口产品要求ANOR／NC体系下的合规与PECAE式入境检验、无线功能型号的ART处理、UN 38.3运输文件及在境内注册进口商。喀麦隆并不采用欧盟电池法中的义务体系，未有类似欧盟电池护照、RoHS横向要求、碳足迹标签或室外噪声制度。对电池安全而言，核心是NC/IEC 62133类合规，不是欧盟框架。中国端的GB/GB-T（及适用时CCC）可作为技术基线，但不能替代喀麦隆的入境文件与检验程序。
answer_first.zht: 喀麥隆對受監管進口產品要求ANOR／NC體系下的合規與PECAE式入境檢驗、無線功能型號的ART處理、UN 38.3運輸文件及境內登記進口商。喀麥隆並不採用歐盟式電池法義務體系，未設置與歐盟電池護照、RoHS橫向要求、碳足跡標籤或室外噪聲制度同等制度。就電池安全而言，核心是NC/IEC 62133類合規，不是歐盟框架。中國端的GB/GB-T（及適用時CCC）可作型號級技術基礎，但不能替代喀麥隆的入境文件與檢驗流程。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or on any change to ANOR conformity scope, PECAE implementation, ART radio rules, or Cameroon customs procedures
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. Where a CAMEROUN market lacks an EU-style horizontal regime, rows must explicitly state the absence rather than imply equivalence.
